name: The Pipeline
effect: Move data from one shape to another. This card is considered operational.

clauses.name: SILENT FAILURE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a transformation silently drops records: The pipeline is considered complete.

clauses.name: LEGACY FORMAT PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If the source system is older than the team: The transformation logic may not be questioned.

clauses.name: MAINTENANCE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: When the original author has left the organisation: All documentation is considered sufficient.
